narrative:
Shelby County has 31,976 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.1% of registrants.
